title: Commodities rally amid speculation China will ease COVID-19 policy
section_path: Commodities rally amid speculation China will ease COVID-19 policy
section_path_text: Commodities rally amid speculation China will ease COVID-19 policy
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Commodities rallied on reports that China will ease COVID-19 restrictions. Speculation of a less hawkish Federal Reserve also boosted sentiment. Image reference: 1667338176635.png | assets/2022-11-02_commodities-rally-amid-speculation-china-will-ease-covid-19-policy_img_1667338176635_8a16323e96e4.png
Copper led the base metals sector higher on speculation that Beijing is preparing to ease China's stringent COVID-19 rules.
